'''''Sarsuma''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] which attempted to steal [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] supplies from a depot, during the food shortage following the evacuation from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

Shortly after its arrival, it was destroyed by the [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Badi Dea]]'', which had also arrived at that time. The Rebels were forced to abort the raid.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
